label: Building Entities
title: BuildingEntity API
lead: Register sprite-backed world objects with placement rules, custom scripts, drops, and optional world generation.
bodyHtml:
Register a building prefab

BuildingEntityRegistry.Register creates an inactive prefab for a custom BuildingEntity. The prefab can be spawned by BuildingEntityRegistry.Spawn, Utils.Create, console commands, save loading, or CUCoreLib world generation.

Use this page for straightforward buildings: simple props, veins, floor objects, and other cases where you mainly need a sprite, health, placement, and drops.

BuildingEntityRegistry.Register("glassworkscentrifuge", new CustomBuildingEntityDefinition
{
    Name = "Centrifuge",
    Description = "A mechanical device capable of separating selected liquids from containers.",
    Sprite = AssetLoader.LoadEmbeddedSprite("Images.centrifuge.png", 8f),
    Health = 500f,
    Metallic = true,
    HitSoundReferenceId = "metal",
    Placement = BuildingPlacementType.Floor,
    SpawnMinPerChunk = 0.07f,
    SpawnMaxPerChunk = 0.07f,
    SurfaceOffset = 0.5f,
    HeatRadius = 3f,
    HeatPerSecond = 1.2f,
    MaxHeatBodyTemperature = 37.6f,
    Components = new[] { typeof(CentrifugeScript) },
    ItemsDropOnDestroy = new[]
    {
        BuildingEntityRegistry.AddDrop("scrapmetal", 1f, 0.8f, 1f),
        BuildingEntityRegistry.AddDrop("conicalFlask", 0.8f, 0f, 0f)
    }
});

Placement and world generation

Use Placement for the surface type. GenerationStyle stays on this page only because it is still part of the simple worldgen story: None means the building only appears when your mod spawns or places it directly.

BuildingEntityRegistry.Register("glassvein", new CustomBuildingEntityDefinition
{
    Name = "Glass vein",
    Description = "A brittle mineral seam in the wall.",
    Sprite = AssetLoader.LoadEmbeddedSprite("Images.glassvein.png"),
    Placement = BuildingPlacementType.Wall,
    SpawnMinPerChunk = 0.02f,
    SpawnMaxPerChunk = 0.03f,
    SurfaceOffset = 0.35f,
    RandomFlip = false,
    ItemsDropOnDestroy = new[]
    {
        BuildingEntityRegistry.AddDrop("glass", 1f, 0.4f, 1f)
    }
});

Simple building fields

For most custom buildingEntities, you probably do not need anything beyond these fields.

Field Type What CUCoreLib uses it for
IDstringFilled from the registration ID. You usually leave this unset unless collisions occur between mods.
NamestringLocale name registered as building.ID.
DescriptionstringLocale description registered as building.IDdsc.
SpriteSpriteRequired artwork for the custom building prefab.
SortingOrderintSprite render order. Defaults to 5. Higher in front.
ScaleVector3Local scale applied to the prefab root. Defaults to Vector3.one.
Layerint?Optional Unity layer override if you wanna make it glow in the dark. Defaults to the render reference layer.
RenderReferenceIdstringResource ID used for the render reference. Defaults to stoneplant.
HealthfloatBuilding health. Defaults to 250f.
RequireGroundboolWhether the building should break if the ground below is destroyed.
MetallicboolEnables vanilla metallic damage behavior. (Plasma cutter)
CantHitboolUses the vanilla can't-hit behavior. Usually for decoration.
AnimalboolIt's complicated. Read more in the Enemies API page.
IgnoreBodyOptimizeboolSkips vanilla body optimization for this object.
DropChanceMultiplierfloatMultiplies drop chances for this building. Defaults to 1f.
ItemsDropOnDestroyItemDrop[]Conditional drops rolled when the building breaks.
AlwaysDropItemDrop[]Guaranteed drops spawned when the building breaks.
ItemCategoriesToAddstring[]Loot-pool categories used for guaranteed category drops.
GuaranteedDropAmountintHow many category drops to spawn from ItemCategoriesToAdd.
PlacementBuildingPlacementTypeSurface type used for placement. Defaults to Floor.
GenerationStyleBuildingGenerationStyleWorldgen mode. Defaults to None, so buildings only appear when spawned or placed directly.
SpawnMinPerChunkfloatLower bound for worldgen spawn density.
SpawnMaxPerChunkfloatUpper bound for worldgen spawn density.
SurfaceOffsetfloatOffset from the hit surface used when placing or generating the object. Defaults to 0.5f.
RandomFlipboolRandomly mirrors the prefab on spawn. Defaults to true.
SpawnInGroundboolAllows standard worldgen placement even when the target is inside ground.
HitSoundReferenceIdstringShort sound alias used to resolve vanilla hit audio.
HitSoundAudioClipDirect hit sound override. Takes priority over HitSoundReferenceId.
BlockFootstepSoundIdushortVanilla footstep sound ID for the building block.
HeatRadiusfloatOptional passive warming radius around the building in world units. Set above 0 to enable the aura.
HeatPerSecondfloatHow quickly the aura raises the nearby player's body.temperature.
MaxHeatBodyTemperaturefloatOptional cap for aura heating. 0 means no cap.
bodyText: Register a building prefab BuildingEntityRegistry.Register creates an inactive prefab for a custom BuildingEntity . The prefab can be spawned by BuildingEntityRegistry.Spawn , Utils.Create , console commands, save loading, or CUCoreLib world generation. Use this page for straightforward buildings: simple props, veins, floor objects, and other cases where you mainly need a sprite, health, placement, and drops. BuildingEntityRegistry.Register("glassworkscentrifuge", new CustomBuildingEntityDefinition { Name = "Centrifuge", Description = "A mechanical device capable of separating selected liquids from containers.", Sprite = AssetLoader.LoadEmbeddedSprite("Images.centrifuge.png", 8f), Health = 500f, Metallic = true, HitSoundReferenceId = "metal", Placement = BuildingPlacementType.Floor, SpawnMinPerChunk = 0.07f, SpawnMaxPerChunk = 0.07f, SurfaceOffset = 0.5f, HeatRadius = 3f, HeatPerSecond = 1.2f, MaxHeatBodyTemperature = 37.6f, Components = new[] { typeof(CentrifugeScript) }, ItemsDropOnDestroy = new[] { BuildingEntityRegistry.AddDrop("scrapmetal", 1f, 0.8f, 1f), BuildingEntityRegistry.AddDrop("conicalFlask", 0.8f, 0f, 0f) } }); Placement and world generation Use Placement for the surface type. GenerationStyle stays on this page only because it is still part of the simple worldgen story: None means the building only appears when your mod spawns or places it directly. BuildingEntityRegistry.Register("glassvein", new CustomBuildingEntityDefinition { Name = "Glass vein", Description = "A brittle mineral seam in the wall.", Sprite = AssetLoader.LoadEmbeddedSprite("Images.glassvein.png"), Placement = BuildingPlacementType.Wall, SpawnMinPerChunk = 0.02f, SpawnMaxPerChunk = 0.03f, SurfaceOffset = 0.35f, RandomFlip = false, ItemsDropOnDestroy = new[] { BuildingEntityRegistry.AddDrop("glass", 1f, 0.4f, 1f) } }); Simple building fields For most custom buildingEntities, you probably do not need anything beyond these fields. Field Type What CUCoreLib uses it for ID string Filled from the registration ID. You usually leave this unset unless collisions occur between mods. Name string Locale name registered as building.ID . Description string Locale description registered as building.IDdsc . Sprite Sprite Required artwork for the custom building prefab. SortingOrder int Sprite render order. Defaults to 5 . Higher in front. Scale Vector3 Local scale applied to the prefab root. Defaults to Vector3.one . Layer int? Optional Unity layer override if you wanna make it glow in the dark. Defaults to the render reference layer. RenderReferenceId string Resource ID used for the render reference. Defaults to stoneplant . Health float Building health. Defaults to 250f . RequireGround bool Whether the building should break if the ground below is destroyed. Metallic bool Enables vanilla metallic damage behavior. (Plasma cutter) CantHit bool Uses the vanilla can't-hit behavior. Usually for decoration. Animal bool It's complicated. Read more in the Enemies API page. IgnoreBodyOptimize bool Skips vanilla body optimization for this object. DropChanceMultiplier float Multiplies drop chances for this building. Defaults to 1f . ItemsDropOnDestroy ItemDrop[] Conditional drops rolled when the building breaks. AlwaysDrop ItemDrop[] Guaranteed drops spawned when the building breaks. ItemCategoriesToAdd string[] Loot-pool categories used for guaranteed category drops. GuaranteedDropAmount int How many category drops to spawn from ItemCategoriesToAdd . Placement BuildingPlacementType Surface type used for placement. Defaults to Floor . GenerationStyle BuildingGenerationStyle Worldgen mode. Defaults to None , so buildings only appear when spawned or placed directly. SpawnMinPerChunk float Lower bound for worldgen spawn density. SpawnMaxPerChunk float Upper bound for worldgen spawn density. SurfaceOffset float Offset from the hit surface used when placing or generating the object. Defaults to 0.5f . RandomFlip bool Randomly mirrors the prefab on spawn. Defaults to true . SpawnInGround bool Allows standard worldgen placement even when the target is inside ground. HitSoundReferenceId string Short sound alias used to resolve vanilla hit audio. HitSound AudioClip Direct hit sound override. Takes priority over HitSoundReferenceId . BlockFootstepSoundId ushort Vanilla footstep sound ID for the building block. HeatRadius float Optional passive warming radius around the building in world units. Set above 0 to enable the aura. HeatPerSecond float How quickly the aura raises the nearby player's body.temperature . MaxHeatBodyTemperature float Optional cap for aura heating. 0 means no cap.
